reasons: Top candidate WR: 63.3% — room for improvement via cross-mutation.
6 strategy families explored — variety gaps remain.
Walk-forward gate (>=0.8) blocks all current candidates — structural changes needed.

suggestions.candidate_summary: Cross-pollinate top strategy (wedge_exhaustion_reversal) with runner-up doctrine (mean_reversion_liquidity_reclaim).
suggestions.hypothesis: Cross-mutation of the two best-performing candidates may combine their strengths.

suggestions.candidate_summary: Apply best-performing doctrine to worst-performing strategy.
suggestions.hypothesis: If doctrine matters more than strategy, the worst performer may improve with the best doctrine.
